The main topics of the cell culture laboratory are physiology, molecular biology and immunology. In the cell culture laboratory, which aims to contribute to R&D and innovation studies, anticancer, antiviral and anti-inflammatory effects of newly synthesized substances and plant extracts are investigated. In vitro cellular modeling is performed to investigate the molecular mechanisms of diseases. In addition to undergraduate students, it is also a laboratory where graduate students work together with faculty members in their thesis studies, projects and research.

The services offered in our laboratory are as follows:

Testing for multidrug resistance in cancer cell lines

Cytotoxicity tests in cancer cell lines

Wound Healing test

Gene Expression

In vitro models of inflammation

Protein analysis
